Compliance.description: Multiple branches registered with PPRA (formerly EAAB), active partner in PPRA transformation initiatives, no 2025/2026 violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.66/5 from 35 recent reviews (83% 1-star), many rental-specific complaints; Google branch ratings mixed 3-5/5.

Product Value.description: Comprehensive full-service including vetting, payments, maintenance; transparent market-driven pricing aligns with SA norms.

Innovation.description: Online landlord portal for management, mentions of tech trends/sustainability in 2025 blog, no mobile app or advanced digital features found.

Customer Support.description: Branch phone/email support, some fast responses noted but frequent complaints of poor communication and maintenance handling in reviews.

Accessibility & Security.description: Digital portal access available, bank-grade security for payments mentioned on site, PPRA registration implies POPIA compliance, no explicit accessibility features noted.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Industry standard ~8% + VAT commission on monthly rental income

socialSentiment.summary: Predominantly negative from HelloPeter/Google reviews (deposits, service); neutral/positive company news/blogs.
